name: 圣光充能伤害加成
description: 拥有圣光充能buff的棋子造成伤害时，伤害+2
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.sourcePiece; if (!caster) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } var buff = caster.statusTags && caster.statusTags.find(function(tag) { return tag.id === 'holy-charge-buff'; }); if (!buff) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } if (context.damage !== undefined && context.damage > 0) { context.damage += 2; buff.remainingUses = (buff.remainingUses || 1) - 1; if (buff.remainingUses <= 0) { removeStatusEffectById(caster.instanceId, 'holy-charge-buff'); } return { success: true, message: caster.name + '的圣光充能触发，伤害+2' }; } return { success: false, message: '' }; }
